hero.title: Containerized Solutions
hero.subtitle: Integrated expandable container solutions for over 30 years

sections.body: Weatherhaven has been producing integrated expandable container solutions for over 30 years. Our innovative designs are built entirely around the end users' needs.

items.title: Mobile Expandable Container Configuration
items.description: The world's most popular expandable container.

items.title: Extended Height MECC
items.description: Raising the roof on 20' expanding container capability.

items.title: Basic Mobile Expandable Container Configuration
items.description: Robust, mobile, rapidly deployable container solution.

items.title: Air Transportable Expandable Pallet System
items.description: Tactical capability in a pallet footprint.

sections.heading: Why choose Weatherhaven as your redeployable infrastructure and camp provider?

items.title: First class solutions
items.description: We have the operational experience to deliver the right solution for your mission, on time and on budget.

items.title: Professionally engineered and manufactured in America and Europe
items.description: Our facilities in North America and Europe ensure quality manufacturing to the highest standards.

items.title: Delivery and installation across all 7 continents
items.description: For over 45 years we have deployed solutions worldwide, from polar research to desert military camps.
